title: muellera broadwayi
intro: Muellera broadwayi, also known as Chukrasia or Indian Mast Tree, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Muellera broadwayi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as aiding in digestion and boosting the immune system. Muellera broadwayi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used to make traditional medicines and supplements.
